note_en: Predictions are my (Opus 4.8) own reads — for entertainment, not betting advice. Where it matters, my picks now weigh knockout-bracket incentives (seeding, who-avoids-whom) rather than just paper strength. Scratch a panel to reveal my call.
note_zh: 预测为我（Opus 4.8）的个人研判——仅供娱乐，不构成博彩建议。在关键场次，预测已纳入淘汰赛对阵的博弈（签位、避强逻辑），而非单纯纸面实力。刮开面板即可揭晓我的判断。

record.note_en: Opus match-outcome calls, scored from Matchday 3 (group Round 3) onward — the point from which a verified prediction-vs-result ledger exists. Updated each day as new results land.
record.note_zh: 自第三轮（小组赛末轮）起对 Opus 的胜负预测计分——这是有据可查的预测对照赛果起点。每日随新赛果更新。

log.label_zh: 佛得角 0-0 沙特阿拉伯

champions.reason_en: Won Group I with a perfect 9 pts (4-1 Norway, Dembélé hat-trick); R32 vs Sweden June 30 — a kind draw. Looks the most complete side.
champions.reason_zh: 全胜 9 分夺 I 组头名（4-1 挪威，登贝莱帽子戏法）；6 月 30 日 32 强战瑞典——签位友好。看上去最完整。

champions.reason_en: Won Group H (1-0 Uruguay, Baena), holding top to dodge Argentina's side; R32 vs a Group J runner-up. Yamal's spark intact.
champions.reason_zh: 夺 H 组头名（1-0 乌拉圭，巴埃纳），保住榜首以避开阿根廷半区；32 强对阵 J 组次席。亚马尔灵光依旧。

champions.reason_en: Won Group J (6 pts); rotates vs Jordan June 28 with Messi rested before the knockouts. Awaits its R32 opponent.
champions.reason_zh: 已夺 J 组头名（6 分）；6 月 28 日战约旦轮换、雪藏梅西备战淘汰赛。静待 32 强对手。

champions.reason_en: Won Group C; first big knockout test is Japan in R32 June 29; Vinícius and the attack humming.
champions.reason_zh: 夺得 C 组头名；6 月 29 日 32 强首场硬仗战日本；维尼修斯与攻击线状态火热。

champions.reason_en: Group L lead; faces Panama June 27 to seal top — though 1L ironically points toward a Brazil quarter. Kane scoring.
champions.reason_zh: L 组领先；6 月 27 日战巴拿马锁定头名——讽刺的是 L 组头名通向巴西的 1/4 区。凯恩进球。

champions.reason_en: Won Group E despite a 2-1 stumble to Ecuador; R32 vs Paraguay June 29; gritty, physical edge into the knockouts.
champions.reason_zh: 尽管 1-2 不敌厄瓜多尔仍夺 E 组头名；6 月 29 日 32 强战巴拉圭；坚韧、对抗占优地进入淘汰赛。

champions.reason_en: Won Group F (7 pts); possession mastery, but Morocco in R32 June 29 is a stern test of that control.
champions.reason_zh: 夺得 F 组头名（7 分）；控球大师，但 6 月 29 日 32 强碰摩洛哥将严峻考验其掌控力。

players.name: Lionel Messi
players.reason_en: All-time WC goal record holder; Argentina top Group J; rests vs Jordan, eyes a deep run.
players.reason_zh: 世界杯历史进球纪录保持者；阿根廷 J 组头名；战约旦休整，志在深入。

players.name: Kylian Mbappé
players.reason_en: France swept Group I; razor form alongside Dembélé's hat-trick haul; R32 vs Sweden June 30.
players.reason_zh: 法国全胜横扫 I 组；与登贝莱的帽子戏法相映，状态锋利；6 月 30 日 32 强战瑞典。

players.name: Erling Haaland
players.reason_en: Golden Boot lead (6 goals) despite the 1-4 loss to France; Norway 2nd in I, face Ivory Coast in R32 June 30.
players.reason_zh: 尽管 1-4 负法国仍领跑金靴（6 球）；挪威 I 组次席，6 月 30 日 32 强战科特迪瓦。

players.name: Lamine Yamal
players.reason_en: Spain won Group H; creative spark in a side built to go deep; R32 vs a Group J runner-up.
players.reason_zh: 西班牙夺 H 组头名；志在深入的球队中的创造力源泉；32 强对阵 J 组次席。

players.name: Harry Kane
players.reason_en: England top Group L; faces Panama June 27 to seal top spot. Reliable from open play and the spot.
players.reason_zh: 英格兰领跑 L 组；6 月 27 日战巴拿马锁定头名。运动战与点球俱稳。

players.name: Mohamed Salah
players.reason_en: Egypt advanced 2nd in Group G after a 1-1 draw with Iran; African dark horse into the R32.
players.reason_zh: 埃及 1-1 战平伊朗后以 G 组次席出线；杀入 32 强的非洲黑马。

fixtures.reason_en: England seal top, though 1L ironically points toward a Brazil quarter; only a loss avoids it, which won't happen. Rotated but still win.
fixtures.reason_zh: 英格兰锁定头名，讽刺的是 L 组头名通向巴西的 1/4 区；唯有落败方能避开，但不会发生。轮换仍胜。

fixtures.reason_en: Straight shootout for 2nd — and the runner-up lands the friendlier half, clear of Brazil and Argentina. Modrić's Croatia edge Ghana.
fixtures.reason_zh: 争次席的直接对话——次席反而落入更轻松的半区，避开巴西与阿根廷。莫德里奇的克罗地亚力压加纳。

fixtures.reason_en: Tactical chess: topping K brings an easy R32 but a brutal Argentina-then-Brazil road; 2nd dodges both. Neither truly chases the win — cagey draw.
fixtures.reason_zh: 战术博弈：K 组头名 32 强签位轻松，却要走阿根廷接巴西的鬼门关；次席两者皆避。双方都不真想赢——谨慎言和。

fixtures.reason_en: Marginal stakes — DRC cling to faint best-third hopes, Uzbekistan out. DRC edge.
fixtures.reason_zh: 意义有限——刚果（金）寄望渺茫的最佳第三，乌兹别克斯坦出局。刚果险胜。

fixtures.reason_en: Win-or-out for 2nd — and the winner's prize is Argentina in R32. Algeria edge a tight, nervy one.
fixtures.reason_zh: 争次席生死战——胜者的奖品是 32 强对阵阿根廷。阿尔及利亚在紧张中险胜。

fixtures.reason_en: Top seed secured, so Argentina rest Messi and starters; a rotated XI still beats eliminated Jordan, but by a slimmer margin.
fixtures.reason_zh: 头名已定，阿根廷雪藏梅西与主力；轮换阵容仍能击败已淘汰的约旦，但分差收窄。

fixtures.reason_en: R32 opener (A2 v B2). Canada's co-host depth and tempo edge plucky South Africa, fresh off shocking South Korea. Tight, but Canada's quality tells.
fixtures.reason_zh: 32 强揭幕战（A 组次席对 B 组次席）。东道主加拿大阵容厚度与节奏压过爆冷淘汰韩国的南非。胶着，但加拿大实力更胜。

fixtures.reason_en: The seeding trap sprung: Japan's 2nd in F drew the group-stage standout. Brazil's firepower should prevail, but Japan's press makes it a real test.
fixtures.reason_zh: 签位陷阱成真：日本 F 组次席撞上小组赛表现抢眼的巴西。巴西火力应占优，但日本的逼抢会带来真正考验。

fixtures.reason_en: 1E v 3D. Germany's class and physical edge should overwhelm a Paraguay side that scraped in via best-third. Solid German win.
fixtures.reason_zh: E 组头名对 D 组第三。德国的实力与对抗优势应碾压凭最佳第三惊险出线的巴拉圭。德国稳胜。

fixtures.reason_en: 1F v 2C. A heavyweight R32 tie: Dutch possession and edge in quality narrowly beat a resilient, well-drilled Morocco. Close.
fixtures.reason_zh: F 组头名对 C 组次席。32 强重量级对话：荷兰的控球与实力优势险胜坚韧严整的摩洛哥。势均力敌。

fixtures.reason_en: 2E v 2I. Haaland's firepower and Norway's directness edge a strong Ivory Coast in a tight, end-to-end tie.
fixtures.reason_zh: E 组次席对 I 组次席。哈兰德的火力与挪威的直接打法，在你来我往的胶着战中力压强劲的科特迪瓦。

fixtures.reason_en: 1I v 3F. France's perfect group and attacking depth overwhelm a third-placed Sweden that backed into the R32. Comfortable French win.
fixtures.reason_zh: I 组头名对 F 组第三。法国的全胜小组赛与攻击厚度碾压勉强以第三身份晋级的瑞典。法国轻取。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Mexico win group (3-0 Czechia); South Africa stun South Korea 1-0 to grab second on 4 pts. South Korea & Czechia eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：墨西哥头名（3-0 捷克）；南非 1-0 爆冷韩国，以 4 分抢得次席出线。韩国与捷克淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Switzerland win group beating Canada 3-1 (7 pts); Canada through second. Bosnia & Qatar eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：瑞士 3-1 力克加拿大夺头名（7 分）；加拿大次席出线。波黑与卡塔尔淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Brazil win group (3-0 Scotland, Vinícius brace); Morocco second (4-2 Haiti). Scotland & Haiti eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：巴西头名（3-0 苏格兰，维尼修斯梅开二度）；摩洛哥次席（4-2 海地）。苏格兰与海地淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: USA win group (6 pts) despite a 3-2 shock loss to Turkey; Australia second (4 pts, GD); Paraguay third (4 pts) advance via best-third — meet Germany in R32. Turkey eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：美国头名（6 分），尽管 2-3 爆冷负土耳其；澳大利亚次席（4 分，净胜球）；巴拉圭第三（4 分）以最佳第三出线——32 强战德国。土耳其淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Germany win group (6 pts, GD) despite a 2-1 loss to Ecuador; Ivory Coast second (6 pts) — meet Norway in R32; Ecuador third (4 pts) advance via best-third. Curaçao eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：德国头名（6 分，净胜球），尽管 1-2 负厄瓜多尔；科特迪瓦次席（6 分）——32 强战挪威；厄瓜多尔第三（4 分）以最佳第三出线。库拉索淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Netherlands win group (7 pts); Japan second (5 pts) — draw Brazil in R32; Sweden third (4 pts) advance — meet France in R32. Tunisia eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：荷兰头名（7 分）；日本次席（5 分）——32 强撞巴西；瑞典第三（4 分）出线——32 强战法国。突尼斯淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Belgium win group (5 pts, +4 GD after 5-1 New Zealand); Egypt second (5 pts, +2) after a 1-1 draw with Iran. Iran & New Zealand eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：比利时头名（5 分，5-1 新西兰后净胜球 +4）；埃及次席（5 分，+2），1-1 战平伊朗。伊朗与新西兰淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: Spain win group (1-0 Uruguay, Baena); Cape Verde second on a 0-0 with Saudi Arabia — debutants reach the R32. Uruguay & Saudi Arabia eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：西班牙头名（1-0 乌拉圭，巴埃纳）；佛得角凭 0-0 战平沙特获次席——处子参赛即闯入 32 强。乌拉圭与沙特淘汰。

groups.reason_en: FINAL: France win group with a perfect 9 pts (4-1 Norway, Dembélé hat-trick); Norway second (6 pts) — face Ivory Coast in R32. Senegal (5-0 Iraq) & Iraq eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 已定：法国全胜 9 分夺头名（4-1 挪威，登贝莱帽子戏法）；挪威次席（6 分）——32 强战科特迪瓦。塞内加尔（5-0 伊拉克）与伊拉克淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Argentina qualified top (6 pts ✓) and rotate vs Jordan; Austria 3 pts & Algeria 3 pts meet for second June 28 — but the runner-up's prize is Argentina in R32. Jordan eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 阿根廷已锁定头名（6 分✓）并对约旦轮换；奥地利 3 分与阿尔及利亚 3 分 6 月 28 日争次席——但次席奖品是 32 强对阵阿根廷。约旦已淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Colombia 6 pts & Portugal 4 pts both through. June 27 'decider' is a trap: topping K means an easy R32 but an Argentina-then-Brazil road, while 2nd dodges both — expect a cagey draw. Uzbekistan eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 哥伦比亚 6 分、葡萄牙 4 分均出线。6 月 27 日的'头名战'实为陷阱：夺头名 32 强轻松却要走阿根廷接巴西，次席两者皆避——预计谨慎言和。乌兹已淘汰。

groups.reason_en: England 4 pts lead (1L points toward a Brazil quarter, but they'll win anyway); Ghana 4 pts & Croatia 3 pts chase second — the runner-up lands the friendlier half. Panama eliminated. Round 3 June 27.
groups.reason_zh: 英格兰 4 分领先（L 组头名通向巴西 1/4 区，但仍会取胜）；加纳 4 分、克罗地亚 3 分争次席——次席落入更轻松半区。巴拿马已淘汰。第三轮 6 月 27 日。
